hotel_name: Hòa Bình Rạch Giá Resort (Hoa Binh - Rach Gia Resort)

reviews.title: Rude staffs broken bathroom
reviews.text: bathroom flooded, call the front desk to change the room, they said all rooms are like that so I should just sleep.  went for break fast, i was sharing food with birds and flies and no one is doing anything to get rid of flies. wanted to complain to the manager, manager refused to speak to me. staff said the manager is in important meeting at 8 AM.  is there anything urgent than speaking to the guests?  poorly running hotel. when I tried to explain the staffs, the staffs were trying to argue with me. what the heck ????

reviews.title: rude staff, poorly run hotel, irresponsible manger, not sanitary breakfast
reviews.text:
bathroom flooded 1" around the toilet after shower, called the front desk to switch the room or send someone to fix , staff told me all the rooms are like that ( has drain issue) so put a towel on the floor. @-@ 
   Complaint next morning, i asked for the manager at 8AM, staff was on the phone with the manager about 10 min. ( i could literally see the manager talking to the staff 30 feet away !! after the phone conversation the staff told me the manager is busy and i have to wait 30 min.  which manger makes guest wait ? the manager didn't wanted to deal with the upset guest so he was hiding.  Instead of pleasuring guest, staffs were arguing with the guests back and forth and we started to raise voice. there were bunch of flies and birds on breakfast food, but no one will do nothing. complaint about the breakfast, their response was it is clean to eat so I should eat and I will not get sick.  these people don't have basic principle how to run hotel business. after all they are communist

reviews.title: Way way overrated and overpriced!!
reviews.text: This hotel is not even 2 stars. Rooms have very strong mildew smell because they shut the A/C as soon as customer is checked. Bathroom is terrible. Bathtub is elevated for no reason. Shower curtain is just for showing, not effective at all. Strongly recommend against staying here!

reviews.title: staff was not welcoming,  hotel without atmosphere
reviews.text:
-staff was unpleasant.The only words they spoke at our entry were: "passports"; no welcoming words. Typical conference-hotel, not for family's
- water of the shower in our room was leaking; whole bathroom was flooding
- switch off/on of bedlamp was melting,smoking nearly burning
- switch off/on second bedlamp was broken
- lamp in badroom was broken

reviews.title: Clean room with worst buffet breakfasts ever
reviews.text:
Stayed here the second time this time. Was hoping it would be better, disappointingly  it proved otherwise.
Hotel is clean enough (could be better) and surrounded by nice gardens. 
Booked a room with king bed but when I turned up the staff said there was no king bed and that they would give a small double bed and they would connect it to another single bed!!! Not acceptable as room was not as advertised. 
Worst buffet breakfasts ever. 6-9am. With very limited options. Same food every day almost for a whole week when we stayed. People turned up at 8ish and most of the food was gone. On the last day of our stay, we got there at 6.10 and breakfasts were not ready. It was not until almost 6.40 when there were a few dishes available then.
Due to limited choices around town, I may stay there again. If the pool and gardens don’t matter much then there are many other hotels available.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: We had a one night stay here and it was pleasant enough. My only complaint is the shower water did not maintain a hot temperature and the shower tub needs to be updated pretty badly. Otherwise, we loved the breakfast buffet and the location.

reviews.title: The hotel bad quality
reviews.text: The hotel is old, the equipment is degraded, the TV signal is very bad, it is almost impossible to watch, the swimming pool is too dirty to take a bath, the breakfast is very bad, there is not much choice and not worthy of a 4 star rating

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Good location. Lovely gardens and pool. 
The checkin process was painful. First they couldn't find my booking even though it was fully prepaid.  The staff seemed to be more concerned about their process rather customer experience.

reviews.title: Normal!
reviews.text: No hot water for baby take a bath! Wifi garden view no good!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The room and the facilities in the room standard 2 stars only

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Good location and quite for stay. 
The breakfast is very simple and locally.

reviews.title: Not good
reviews.text: I think Hoa Binh resort is only worths 3 stats

reviews.title: The best place to stay in Rach Gia, but who cares?
reviews.text: Hoa Binh is probably the best place to stay in Rach Gia but it is kind of irrelevant since there is nothing to do in Rach Gia and no other competition.  If you are passing through, this is the place to stay however be prepared for 2 star quality and no frills.  Anyone expecting 4 star service will be sorely disappointed.

reviews.title: very basic hotel
reviews.text: Uneventful. There is nothing special about this place. It is just a place to stay in Rach Gia which is a very unremarkable city. The shower liner was moldy.
reviews.positives: relatively clean, centrally located, not noisy

reviews.title: Bad service ÷)
reviews.text:
Good ocean view ÷)
Room was ok.
Service was not good. We had to carried our large luggages up to our rooms by ourselves. No greeting person at the door. How many stars can we grade for this hotel?

reviews.title: Nice staff
reviews.text: Nice staff but the hotel is not as good as I expected

reviews.title: It's ok
reviews.text: They claimed that the sea view was also those on the ground floor with of course no sea view, and said that they have no other room anyway we we said it has no sea view.

reviews.title: Lovely modern hotel
reviews.positives: English speaking staff, comfortable room, close to town

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: nice place to stay.

reviews.title: The hotel is good in general but staff not very helpful, it is a 4 stars hotel but no bell boy.
reviews.text: Also don't show you to your room, just give you the key and you have to figure out where to go. Noisy at night I stayed at level 3 but someone keep dragging the furniture on level 4 all night, complaint to receiptionist but nothing done and it keep happened on the second night too even i made numerous complaining. Lucky i only stayed there for two night. Apart from those issues in general hotel clean, breakfast ok and swimming pool great.

reviews.title: Cockroaches
reviews.text: The price and value for this hotel was reasonable. Location was great. But cleanliness was horrible. As soon as we got to our room, there were two huge cockroaches in our bathroom. We went out for dinner and came back to find more cockroaches in our room. I had to keep everything inside my suitcases and close them tight to make sure I wouldn't be bringing any unwanted visitors home with me the following morning.

reviews.title: Place to stay
reviews.text:
Ok place but breakfast was not much to talk about.

1 of 4 days we had buffet. It was a little better than the poor menu we got the other days.

Restaurant we did not try even i wanted but ..if you want to sell something,show and tell the customer. im not sold of big nice facade. This is maybe the thing in asia or maybe just rach gia?

reviews.title: Quiet resort
reviews.text: The accommodation is good because it is quiet, but the pool water is not good. There are many bugs, and water quality management is necessary. Also, the staff didn’t smile much and were not friendly, which made me feel uncomfortable. However, the breakfast is tasty.

reviews.title: Rach Gia Visit
reviews.text: This is not a 4 star hotel as plastered on there front entrance. The rooms are okay, everything seems very old not at all new and modern as expected.  The tub is very high. You basically have to climb into the tub and hope not to slip and fall before you get in. Not very accommodating for the elders trying to take a normal shower.

reviews.title: One Night Stay
reviews.text: Stayed only one night. Room was big. The Facilities looked like it hasn't been used in a long time so I did not bother testing the pool and such. Overall a ok/great place to stay the night.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Very poor customer service. Hotel is old and rooms are not clean enough

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: A b c d
reviews.response:
Chào anh!
Khách sạn có nhận được đanh giá và phản hồi từ anh.
Khách sạn rất hy vọng anh có thể chia sẽ về chất lượng của khách sạn. Những nhận xét của anh rất cần thiết cho khách sạn để có những điều chỉnh tốt hơn phục vụ khách hàng.
Chúc anh một ngày tốt lành.
Trân trọng.

reviews.title: best located in Rach Gia but service and bfast poor
reviews.text:
hotel location is one the best in Rach Gia however poor service, sign of aging and lack of maintenance for rooms have let this hotel down.  They need to improve these two main issues to qualify as four star rating.
i stayed in one of deluxe double. There was leak from toilet water tap. I reported 3 times to reception  but no fixes at the end. Almost no proper cust attention to guests for breakfast. I am not really sure how they got 4 star rating from. 
i stayed in Saigon and Hue 2-3 star and got much better service than this one.

reviews.title: Plesant stay, clean rooms adequate service.
reviews.text: Quite relaxing stay. Pool was dirty did not see one guest in the pool. Morning Buffet was decent.
reviews.positives: Clean room, separate balcony, good view

reviews.title: Good hotel with a good restaurant
reviews.text: Small swimming pool. Employers are nice and helpful. The restaurant here is good and the price is on avg in compare with HCMC. The location is kind of boring. The room is clean and as expected from a starred hotel.

reviews.title: No hot water
reviews.text: Water was not hot for the shower the first night due to hotel was fully booked, but improvement on 2nd night.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I stayed at this hotel for two nights, and the hot water was never really hot. The breakfast was okay, but birds would come in and eat the food at the display area. There’s a supermarket nearby, but the beachfront isn’t suitable for swimming.

reviews.title: Very good!
reviews.text:
The best location
Good restaurant

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: no hot water in the showers, everything else was fine

reviews.title: Nice!
reviews.text:
Nice environment in a countryside of Rach Gia.

Breakfast need to be improve. No top-up of food when run low. And some food are cold.

reviews.title: great peaceful hotel break
reviews.text:
restful stay, a couple of days relaxing on the beach, hotel shuttle running regulary into Hoi An,which is a great place to explore.
hotel  bed very comfortable, nice rooms, good friendly staff.
only negatives were 1. a noisy aircon with minimum controls, and the annoying + 10%tax + 5% service charge on already inflated prices,charged on everything .
excellent breakfast in nice riverside restaurant, but evening meals were average and poor value, compared to local restaurants
reviews.positives: nice rooms, own section of beach, breakfast next to river

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: A little bit old but good enough

reviews.title: Clean and peaceful place
reviews.text:
Peaceful place with nice scenery. Rooms are away from the main roads so the place is quiet. 
Breakfast is basic with a few options though most of the food finished by 9ish. 
The pool is small though the water is clear. 
The bed is rather hard but still quite comfy. 
Overall, a good place and we would come back.

reviews.title: Good breakfast and friendly staff
reviews.text: Everything good

reviews.title: Room was ok
reviews.text: Is was ok, staffs was friendly. In the central of city.

reviews.title: Great prices and rooms but disgusting food
reviews.text:
We booked hotel just for one night before ferry to Phu Quoc.
Hotel offers room by very affordable prices.
Rooms very comfortable and have everything you need - I never expected this from such an inexpensive hotel.
There is only one BIG minus - quality of food is less than zero! Breakfast fruit plate had only one apple and slices of papaya - nothing more. All the meat was half-cooked. Very small variety and poor quality of food, even for money.
reviews.positives: Big room, extremely friendly and helpful staff

reviews.title: Convenience for Phu Quoc ferry with a nice pool
reviews.text:
Breakfasts are cooked to order rather than the buffet everywhere else and were very good. Reception said that this is becuase the hotel is very new (early 2013) and doesn't have enough guests to make a buffet cost effective so this may change soon.
We would use this hotel for the ferry if we came this way again, we arrived late and left early so we could be wrong, but their didn't seem very much to do nearby.  Friendly and helpful staff.
To be honest we only rated Rach Gis for sightseeing because the Agoda website makes you choose something.  It looked pleasant enough but with so many other wonderful places in Vietnam, don't spend time here unless you need to.
reviews.positives: convenience for ferry, pool nad breakfast

reviews.title: Hoa Binh Rach Gia Resort
reviews.text: Spacious resort, large parking lot, pool a bit small, delicious breakfast, enthusiastic staff, cleaning not very thorough.

reviews.title: Good choice
reviews.text: Good venue, friendly staff, cleanliness

reviews.title: Great Choice
reviews.text: Even though it is winter it is still humid so the pool was great. Lots of shopping and rest all within walking distance and not far from the jetty. The sunset from the bar was amazing.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: A welcome surprise and reasonably priced.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Great location with excellent service. The rooms lack sound resistance.

reviews.title: Hoa Binh Rach Gia Resort
reviews.text: Beautiful resort with spacious parking, large garden, clean rooms, delicious breakfast, enthusiastic staff, slightly small pool.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Value for money,  good location, very beautiful garden.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Everything was fine except for the gym room. There were very few, basically no, appropriate equipment for training, and instead, there were two billiard tables. The worst part is that there were ashtrays in the room, making it a smoking area. It's definitely not recommended to exercise in that environment. I had to exercise outside in the morning. Overall, the facility gets zero points for exercising room

reviews.title: Beautiful property
reviews.text: Beauty property with breakfast included. The bathrooms could use a little touching up as water splashes everywhere and bathtubs are tall.

reviews.title: How Binh Rach Gia
reviews.text: Only stayed one night on our way from Phu Quoc to Can Tho - room was lovely a little leak though and the safe didn’t work - but it was a nice comfortable stay and great breakfast!

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: No complaints

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Breakfast is perfect

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
very comfortable and clean
The personal  are very friendly and helpful

reviews.title: Pretty ok
reviews.text: Staff is not very helpful and is pretty slow in processing guest's request. Other than that, the stay is pretty pleasant.

reviews.title: Enjoyed our 1 night stay
reviews.text: The receptionist was very helpful with onward journey arrangements, taxi, information etc. Room was fine. Enjoyed the pool during the heat of the day.

reviews.title: Wonderful view
reviews.text: Very nice resort. Would recommend getting a room with a view of the river and bridge - it is gorgeous and the light it up at night. Don't miss the sunset.  Only suggestions would be it would be nice to have some furniture on the verandah and the pool furniture and umbrellas all broken, need fixing.  Pool itself is lovely and very clean. I will recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: Impersonal, however helpful personnel if you ask. Good value for money, recommended for a few days. Helped to arrange ferry tickets to Phu Quoc.

reviews.title: Very Bed
reviews.text: Never again,not getting...The treatment focused on their work...

reviews.title: Good trip
reviews.text: i have good time here.
reviews.positives: good location, best price and friendly

reviews.title: nice place, friendly staff.
reviews.text: very good

reviews.title: Good for short stay
reviews.text: Great room, pleasant gardens and pool area, restaurant outside in lovely setting next to water but plagued with flies and just impossible to eat there so ended up having meal in the room, food very good just a pity about the flies. Little english spoken at reception but still as helpful as they could be.
reviews.positives: short taxi ride to ferry, good quality, great value

reviews.title: good quality for money, clean
reviews.text: Relaxing, quiet and nice garden resort with pool and mostly a generous breakfast buffet, except in times of low frequencies: then the breakfast is rather poor. Some staff speak an acceptable english.

reviews.title: Happy, will stay again
reviews.text:
I booked 7 rooms for 1 night stay. The hotel is next to a good local restaurant, near the beach, with quite good view. The rooms are spacious, clean and decorated well. 
Breakfast are a bit too rush if you need to catch ealy flight. Otherwise, everything is good as a 4 star.

reviews.title: Best hotel in Rach Gia
reviews.text: We had a lovely time in Rach Gia.  It felt like we were the only ones in the resort.  Spent a couple of hours each afternoon in the pool with no one else around.  Staff were very helpful.  Definitely going to stay here again when we are next in Rach Gia.
reviews.positives: Very helpful staff, very soft bed and great swimming pool

reviews.title: Nice resort centrally located
reviews.text: We stayed in nice resort which is centrally located and we assume that is one of the best what Rach Gia has to offer. For that what they are rated and for the price we got it is definerely a great bargain. Even though this is a four star hotel lacks certain services that it should have (spa, gym, significantly better choice of breakfast dishes). But definitely you should have dinner at their restaurant.

reviews.title: Comfortable and stylish
reviews.text: Huge resort hotel, but very comfortable and well appointed rooms.  Felt very new. Nice balcony overlooking the pool and river (and the building of a big new bridge, but with the window shut there wasn't any noise). Swimming pool good and gardens attractive. Had a really good meal at a restaurant just down the road called Niken Quan Restaurant.
reviews.positives: Great pool, comfortable room and friendly staff

reviews.title: new hotel
reviews.text:
nice hotel, very clean and only opened for 2 months. 
very friendly staff
great food with a very good price.

reviews.title: nice
reviews.text: value for money hotel in the centre of the city.

reviews.title: My first visit Rach Gia
reviews.text: The resort has a nice location , close to the water and Vincom plaza. The breakfast is good with all kind of Vietnamese dishes for breakfast.

reviews.title: Everything is at a decent level, I'm not very impressed.
reviews.text: My family has a small child who loves the pool, but the pool here is small and the water is not clean. The staff is enthusiastic, and the breakfast is acceptable. However, I feel that the size of the hotel does not merit a 4-star rating. I rate it 7/10.

reviews.title: Nice hotel in a good location.
reviews.text: Room was clean and there is a pool. Their breakfast was good with different varieties of food every day.

reviews.title: Tốt
reviews.text: Khách sạn tốt trong giá tiền

reviews.title: Comfortable, clean and central
reviews.text:
Overall a nice facility. Rooms are clean, air conditioner works well, there is an elevator.  Breakfast buffet varied every day, with the rotation repeating after four days.  Mostly local dishes.
The only major drawback to this hotel is the bathroom, specifically the bathtub. It is nearly 30” from the floor, making it quite hazardous to get in and out. I was traveling with elderly parents, and this almost proved a deal breaker to leave to another hotel. But my parents made do, and the facility provided extra grip mats for the inside as well as the outside of the tub.  There is little luxury to a soaking tub nowadays, so they would be better off changing the bathrooms to standing showers.

Overall a nice stay—i would come back. Nearly twice as expensive as the average establishment in the area, but they do come. Very close to western comfort amenities.

reviews.title: Best accommodations in Rach Gia
reviews.text:
For an American Traveler, accommodations here will resemble an older 2.5-3 star but clean hotel.  This is definitely among the nicest and cleanest spaces in Rach Gia though.  Rooms are indeed clean, comfortable with adequate (not powerful, but adequate) air conditioning.  Staff were very friendly.
The breakfast buffet has a limited selection but very nice traditional Vietnamese foods.
Location is convenient to much of Rach Gia.

reviews.title: Average hotel room but great traditional Vietnamese Foods
reviews.text: Room was average - convenient location and good selection of traditional Vietnamese foods

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great hotel, the staff are excellent & facilities are well maintained. The only thing that lets it down is the breakfast.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Perfect for overnight stay to access the Superdong ferry to Phu Quoc.

reviews.title: Good hotel for a couple of days in Rach Gia
reviews.text: Staff were very helpful, resort was very quiet so enjoyed the pool on our own most of the time.   Close to all we wanted to do. Rooms were clean. Breakfast was average.

reviews.title: Nice pool and breakfast
reviews.text: My boyfriend and I were in Rach Gia for a wedding. We really liked the staff, especially the reception - very friendly and helpful - even the kitchen who spoke little English. The room was spacious and tastefully arranged, with lots of furniture and a comfy bed. I didn't get a chance to jump into the pool, but it looked large and clean enough.

reviews.title: Excellent stay with attentive staff
reviews.text: The stay was for one night but wished we could have stayed longer. The staff were lovely and gave us a great welcome. The town itself is great and wished we could have discovered more of it. We arrived late afternoon and left early morning. We ate in the resturant which has a lovely location down on the riverfront.
reviews.positives: large room, good location, nice pool

reviews.title: Great stay with very Good breakfast
reviews.text: Great location with very friendly staffs. Love their breakfast! While the facilities were solid ,  the bed could have been improved unless you paid extra for upgrade. Overall, it’s a good choice for anyone looking to enjoy a pleasant getaway with a few minor drawbacks.

reviews.title: Excellent service and great price
reviews.text: Excellent staffs and service. Good breakfast buffet.

reviews.title: One of the best
reviews.text: Receptionist is very professional , kitchen staff Koch very nice , safety is good, gym room have to upgarade.

reviews.title: My family vacation
reviews.text: Staffs very good and will to help

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: Clean. The breakfast buffet rotates every four days or so, so that is a plus for folks staying longer than a week. Has an elevator, which is a plus for physically challenged folks. The bathtub situation is pretty abysmal though, and is the only black eye to an otherwise nice property. It is quite a hazard to get in and out without nearly slipping to your death. At least they should add some grab bars to ameliorate the situation. It is at least 8-10” highrr than your average tub height

reviews.title: Small hotel, nice staff
reviews.text: The location of this hotel is the best, near mall, restaurants,sea and the port. The staff was very nice and supportive.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Best stop in the city

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Stayed at this hotel about a dozen times. Best hotel in Rach Gia IMO. Better location that Saigon Rach Gia Hotel. There's a new Vincom mall right across the street. Also there a street with many great cafe shops and restaurants near by.

reviews.title: Viet Nam discovery
reviews.text: My first visit to Rach Gia was made memorable with a stay at the Hoa Binh Resort...The price for the Resort was head and shoulders below what I expected to pay. The location, facilities and setting was head and shoulders above anything else in the Mekong. My family were as impressed as I was.....I WILL RETURN !!!

reviews.title: Convivial
reviews.text: Staffs are sincere and polite. Nice sea view if you choose this side.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great swimming pool, great location near the ferry to Phu Quoc.  Staff excellent and friendly

reviews.title: Great staffs . Very friendly and helpful
reviews.text: Bathroom smell from sewer . Dirty bathroom curtain
3rd year in a row be back fir a forth

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: good

reviews.title: Staff so nice
reviews.text: The hotel and restaurant are right by the river which makes it interesting,we had a brilliant stay,the staff so friendly,could not fault anything,very nice pool,two minutes from supermarket and in the afternoon the kite seller flyes his kites right by the hotel, got to mention Cao Minh Tuan who was so helpful and help us burn our ghost money! Nothing was too much trouble for him, and his English was good

reviews.title: Great hotel in country town
reviews.text: Third time stayed in this hotel and as before hotel rooms are maintained neatly and in great condition, staffs are friendly, helpful and responsive. Surely, will stay this hotel again next time in town
reviews.positives: Room comfort and cleanliness, helpful and friendly staff and value for money

reviews.title: Nice Hotel
reviews.text: Nice place, plenty of nightlife, many bars and restaurants
reviews.positives: The room, the views and sunset

reviews.text: room was big and clean, service was great, breakfast was reasonable, nice gardens and very relaxing place

reviews.title: High standard Hotel for stop over to Phu Quoc
reviews.positives: If you want to pamper yourself with a clean, nice and friendly Hotel - this is value for money!

reviews.title: Relaxing, with beautiful surroundings
reviews.text: Enjoyable stay, quiet and relaxing. Enjoyed the pool and gardens.

reviews.title: Great Stay in Rach Gia
reviews.text: While it's not a real 5 star hotel, it's probably the best there is in Rach Gia. It's very spacious and has excellent location. Staff are great. Room is clean.

reviews.title: Nice clean hotel with friendly staffs
reviews.text: Hotel is located at ideal location, next to river and shopping area. Nice and spacious room layout. Breakfast had great variety although we wish some food would be nice to served warm like steamed yam and sticky rice.  Good rice soup. Hot noodle dishes tasted ok not exceptional. Staffs were always smiling greeting guests. Room service is excellent and clean

reviews.title: Should go with family.
reviews.text: My family stayed here, and our two little ones really enjoyed the swimming pool. The pool is clean. The breakfast buffet is quite delicious. The staff is gentle and polite.

reviews.title: Spent a good one night!
reviews.text: The hotel overall was a great stay, breakfast was amazing great selection

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel with a relaxing resort vibe
reviews.text: Hotel grounds is spacious with a relaxing vibe in a busy part of town.  Highly recommended for the friendliness and accommodating staff.  Love the variety on offer each morning for breakfast.  Room are comfortable, however lacks an iron.  Unfortunately they don’t provide you with one.  Have to get them to iron for you which comes at a fee.  Not ideal if you have multiple items and just want to iron yourself.

reviews.title: Nice central hotel
reviews.text: Nice facility. No complaints other than the ridiculously high bathtub.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good 👍

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text:
The hotel is good but the upper floors are under renovation
I booked a sea view room but got no such room because of renovation
I should not have paid for a sea view room

reviews.title: Best in Rach Gia
reviews.text: Have been to many hotels in the area and this is by far the best. Close to the Phu Quoc ferry and across the street from Vincom.

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: Good breakfast.

reviews.title: Great staff, great breakfast, beautiful grounds, good room
reviews.text:
Pros: staff, breakfast, grounds, balcony with seaview to watch sunset, large room.  Local places to eat everywhere.
Cons:  high bathtub you have to climb, washroom could be brighter and fresher although it is still clean.  Overall recommend.

reviews.title: Nice quiet resort just outside city center.
reviews.text: The breakfast buffet was great and the head chef really likes to take care of the guests.

reviews.title: Great , very friendly staffs , nice breakfast
reviews.text: Lush garden move swimming pool

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Helpful staff spoke fluent English and sorted out ferry tickets.  Well equipped gym.  Spacious room with balcony overlooking well tended garden.  A wide selection of restaurant options on Co Bac.

reviews.title: Restful stay
reviews.text: Kind staff, great for a restful stay

reviews.title: couple
reviews.text: very good resort for little town , staff are very friendly and excellent location also very good breakfast . will stay here again next time .highly recommend

reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied. Value for money. Good food.
reviews.text: We've stayed there only for 2 days, but good enough to rate this hotel 4 stars as it is. The buffet is wonderful. The staff are friendly and helpful. Highly recommended to those who want to have good time in Rach Gia.

reviews.title: great stay, relaxing beautiful place near city
reviews.text: large room and relaxed environment, beautiful gardens
reviews.positives: clean, spacious rooms and very peaceful

reviews.title: perfect overnight location for phu quoc
reviews.text: Just perfect to stay overnight if you need to catch the boat to phu quoc. It's 5 min from the dock and they arrange tickets die you without charge.
reviews.positives: very friendly staff, perfect location, clean and large rooms!

reviews.title: wonderful resort, great price, great staff
reviews.text:
A wonderful resort, with very helpful staff. 

Breakfast at the adjoining cafe/restaurant was very good. The pool looked nice, didn't try it out due to heavy storms.

reviews.title: Lovely clean resort with exceptional staff.
reviews.text: Lovely new resort with wonderful gardens, good food & friendly, helpful staff.

reviews.title: better than expected
reviews.positives: very clean, very friendly staff, nice rooms

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text:
This is a really nice resort for a small city. The room was large, clean and had a small balcony. The pool was really nice too. The breakfast was simple, but probably above average for Vietnam.

Note: The receptionists were very friendly however their English was limited. I didn't have anything wrong with my room, but if you did, it would be difficult for them to understand.

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text:
The hotel closes to an open area where we can walk in the morning. Roomy, clean
Breakfast is amazing, typical southern Vietnamese food
Second time I stay here, will be stay here again if i come back

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Room clean and big but restroom small . Breakfast is good.

reviews.title: The Wild Bund
reviews.text: friendly staffs. The rooms were clean.  The bath tub is higher than standard so be careful when you step in or out of the tub.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Convenient for travel, beautiful location, clean rooms, friendly and nice staff. The breakfast is quite delicious. However, the hotel often lacks hot water at night, which is a bit inconvenient. 
I hope the hotel can fix this so that more tourists come to Hoà Bình - Rạch Giá Resort.

reviews.title: Annual trip to Rach Gia
reviews.text: Hoa Binh is a very nice hotel with a wonderful saltwater pool to help us cool off each day.  The staff is very friendly, kind and helpful. They spoke both Vietnamese and English, which was very helpful. They were wonderful at all times.  We enjoyed our stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Ok

reviews.title: On the banks of the river at Rach Gia
reviews.text: Situated within extensive park-like grounds that stretch to the river itself, this very pleasant hotel has well-appointed rooms with very comfortable beds. Breakfast is great with a large array of traditional Vietnamese dishes as well as an omelet-station, all served in a stunning bee-hive structure by the hotel. The grounds are lovely and contain a swimming pool. My only complaint was that my bathwater was somewhat tepid in the morning, but overall, a wonderful stay.

reviews.title: Beautiful Outdoor Restaurant
reviews.text: Nice hotel with good location and a beautiful airy outdoor restauraunt but was expensive for a small town hotel.  Breakfast selection was good.  The family room for 3 people was large and comfortable.  There are no restaurants outside  the hotel so will have to walk a short distance for food.  Love Rach gia.  Get to see the local people and farmland without the tourist crowd. Staff was friendly but speak only a little bit of English.

reviews.title: Good stay in Rach Gia
reviews.text: Cute resort and clean.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: The hotel has a good location.It's near to vincom.The room is clean.The staff is kindly.He helped us for calling taxi to the airport at 5:30am.I regretted to taste breakfast.Its a good choice during staying in rach gia.I will recommend this hotel to my friends.

reviews.title: Great hotel in rach gia
reviews.text: We stayed only one night on the travel to Phu Quoc. The room was big and clean and had a very good shower. We enjoyed the pool in the evening, which was very refreshing. Staff was very friendly and to the ferry it is only about 15 minutes by feet. We would stay there again.

reviews.title: Central nice location, good staff and clean hotel
reviews.text: lovely place, relaxing environment, nice gardens, big room
reviews.positives: clean, spacious rooms and very peaceful

reviews.title: Great hotel in country town
reviews.text: I have been in Rach Gia a few times and never find a comfortable hotel in this country town and finally found this hotel. It has clean and comfortable room, helpful staff and close to local restaurants and nightlife.

reviews.title: Perfect Respite
reviews.text: We arrived by bicycle and received a warm reception. Despite limited English, all staff we encountered did their level best to provide us with the help and service we required. Rooms were clean and spacious and had all the amenities we were looking for...a comfy bed, A/C, a fridge, TV with a limited English language selection and a view of the ocean. Spent hours relaxing by the pool. They could use more chaise loungers...there were only two. We would definitely come again.
reviews.positives: Friendly and helpful staff,  wonderfully clean hotel and great swimming pool

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Total hygiene

reviews.title: Mr
reviews.text: Excellent place to stay, very friendly stuff.

reviews.title: Friend ly staff
reviews.text:
We recommend this hotel if you have opportunity travel to my hometown Rach Gia
Best choice hotel in tow

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Excellent facility , good service, friendly staff

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Very nice and clean, good breakfast already stayed here and will come back

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel’s location is excellent. There are many restaurants and amenities nearby. The hotel is clean and airy, and the staff are friendly and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Excellent location
reviews.text: Hotel is in excellent location. Beautiful view of the Seaview. Room is very spacious and comfortable. Bed is very comfy. Has been staying at this hotel every time we in Rach Gia . Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Best in Rach Gia
reviews.text: Very clean and friendly staff.

reviews.title: The Best in Rach Gia
reviews.text:
I booked 3 bedrooms on the rooftop. The rooms are very cleaned and have beautiful views. 
I stayed at Saigon Rachgia hotel before and this place is better in term of room cleanliness. 
Staff are awesome.
Will definitely come back again.

reviews.title: Best stay
reviews.text: Will definitely come back again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Enjoyed my staff. Everything good

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Overall good

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.text: This was our second stay at the resort. The first time was before we went to Phu Quoc, and we had the top floor river facing room, which was fantastic. And the breakfast was amazing! We liked it so much that we stayed here again on our return from Phu Quoc. This time, we chose a garden facing room, which happened to be on the second floor facing the dining area. It was pleasant enough, but I was woken up very early in the morning as we could hear the staff preparing for breakfast. Just something to note if you are choosing between a river facing or a garden facing room. Otherwise, everything else was near perfect!

reviews.title: Hotel in the center, delicious breakfast.

Hi
Only stayed 1 night as we were traveling around Cambodia and Vietnam. 
Our stay here was fantastic and would recommend   the Rach Gia Resort.
Karl & Suzy

reviews.title: Bửa sáng tuyệt vời

reviews.title: Clean resort, central location RG
reviews.text:
Clean, comfortable bedding
Breakfast may be limited in variety but delicious, rooms are fully equipped
Haven't been in the pool yet, so I don't know if it's clean or not
There is a gym and a billiards table

reviews.title: Top shops in Rạch Giá
reviews.text: The room is clean, fully equipped. The bed is comfortable and the price is reasonable compared to a 4-star hotel.

reviews.title: Hotel OK
reviews.text:
Hotel OK
+ Reasonable price

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Excellent

reviews.title: Very nice hotel, with some issues
reviews.text:
- Bed was ver comfortable
- Staff and reception were outstanding.
- Nice big room
- Room had a tub for shower which as an older person, its very difficult getting into and out of tub after showering without falling because of slippery surface of tub and floor of bathroom. I don't like showers in tubs.
- The hotel was listed on Agoda as having a restaurant and bar. It does but it's closed for business. There was a small "restaurant" behind the hotel only open until 5 pm, that served a very limited menu (like fried rice). If the restaurant and bar is closed, that should be noted on the Agoda site as I booked this hotel feeling I could get dinner every evening at hotel..I could not.
- Outstanding breakfast buffet
- Mosquitoes in room

reviews.title: Good and clean hotel for fair price
reviews.text: Excellent location, easy check in and many good restaurants and cafe nearby. Would recommend others and will book here when return to the area.

reviews.title: overnight Stay
reviews.text: Perfect location. Breakfast is so delicious

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: It is much better than the pictures, it was clean and refreshing, and the water pressure was excellent. The breakfast was delicious for the price and generous. I highly recommend it if you come to this area. The swimming pool is small but lovely. However, while it is not cold, it seems that the hot water is not steady.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: First time to visit this hotel.  Good service,.

reviews.title: A good transit night
reviews.text: I stayed 1 night here on November 25th, overall this resort is good. Many thanks for the hospitality from Thắng and Trang in the front office who are so friendly. He convinced the manager to upgrade my room to the next category room on the rooftop for a nice experience. There were so many options in the buffet breakfast, the food was so fresh and delicious. Definitely great value for money and I would recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: I visited for the second time.
reviews.text:
Just like during my last visit, the staff's service is really good. 
They are kind and provided a lot of assistance. ^^ 
I brought my mom and aunt, and they were very happy, saying the room was bright and the garden was spacious and cool. 
If I have the chance to visit again, I would love to come back. 
I definitely want to express my gratitude. 
Thank you.

reviews.title: Time to return to school.
reviews.text: The family has been here for over 10 years (2-3 times a year), every time returning to the hometown and has no intention of changing to another guest.. however, I really hope this organization will have more 5-star resorts and hotels, I would be more satisfied.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: First time here but really like it. The hotel is a bit old, but overall the room is still beautiful, fully equipped with a nice view. The hotel has a lot of plants, making it very cool, and the area is spacious with a clean pool. Overall, I am pleased. If I have the chance to go to Rach Gia again, I will stop by. However, the breakfast buffet has few dishes, but on the other hand, it is delicious. 😘

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Excellent location. Staff are friendly. Very happy with the hotel cleaning staff. Would stay again if in Rach Gia next time.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Hotel's name means peaceful in vietnamese
reviews.text: And as the name is indicating, this hotel is a peaceful place. The staff is friendly and do their best for making the stay comfortable. The place is well located.   zzzz Since 8 years, we are traveling to Rach Gia (several times per year) and Hoa Binh is on top of our list for the accommodation in this city.

Located in the center of new city, many coffe shops & restaurants around.
Nice & supportive staff.
Modern facilities.

reviews.title: Great Hotel
reviews.text: Third time stay in this resort and very happy with everything  provided by this resort especially in a country town like Rach Gia.

reviews.title: Lovely place
reviews.text: Location was convenient near shoppings and the ocean. The hotel itself was clean, excellence buffet, friendly staff, and fair price.

reviews.title: Beautiful Place
reviews.text: We only stayed one night before catching the ferry to Phu Quoc and we had a great experience. We had an ocean side room with a balcony and the view of the sunset over the water was amazing! The resort is very well-maintained and beautiful. The breakfast offered a great variety, including amazing banh xeo. The pool looked nice, although we didn't have time to swim in it. The staff was lovely and very kind and helpful.  Bathrooms are very nice and beds were very comfortable with super soft sheets. Overall, we were very impressed and I would highly recommend this hotel to other travelers!

reviews.title: value for money
reviews.text: superb . staffs offer excellent services .  food is very good .Room is very clean as well as swimming pool . Good price  . Safety place and  excellent resort  .Strong recommendation to another people

reviews.title: Great place to stay
reviews.text: Great location and great facilities

reviews.title: Friendliest and most helpful staff. Beautiful..
reviews.text: Beautiful location. Very friendly staff. I needed help booking flights to Nga Trang, so they call and made all arrangements. We felt very safe and welcomed.
reviews.positives: Staff was knowledgable and helpful finding places to go.

reviews.title: Great Staff, great accommodation, very nice
reviews.text: We loved staying at the Hotel - it was friendly, courteous, clean, definitely 4 star..
reviews.positives: The people, the pool, the gardens

reviews.title: lovey hotel with great services
reviews.text:
great services
clean
great location near the ocean
love the garden
variety of food choices for breakfast

reviews.title: Lovely hotel and great location
reviews.text: this hotel seems to be quite new but we did not have a chance to check out about it. the restaurants next to this hotel provide great food with reasonable price for lunch/dinner. breakfast was included in the hotel price. we spent most of our time relaxing around the pool. we stayed at this hotel so that we could catch the superdong (speedboat) to phu quoc island the next day and it was a great way to get to know another small town. local kids were great and they love to say "hello" to tourist.
reviews.positives: Beautiful view of the beach from our hotel room

reviews.title: The best in Rach Gia
reviews.text:
This hotel was a positiv surprise. Nice, clean rooms, and possibly both the sweetest and friendliest reception staff I ever have met in a hotel. The smiles more than made up for limited English skills.
The breakfast was served in the open air restaurant beside the river. Nice food, nice niew and the fantatic vietnamse coffee made the breakfast a good start on the day.

reviews.title: Bon hotel dans quartier tranquille
reviews.text: Grand hotel, chambre spacieuse au calme. La piscine est moyenne mais correct par contre le Fitness n est pas a l a hauteur

reviews.title: Bon hotel mais se dégrade
reviews.text:
Cet hotel était très bien il y a deux ans… mais la qualité s’est dégradée : une prise de courant sur deux ne fonctionne pas bien, des bruits de perceuses dès le matin à 8 heures, les cabines de douches fuient et certaines portes sont rafistolées avec du fil de fer et s’ouvrent dans le mauvais sens ce qui fait qu’il faut se contorsionner pour rentrer, (quand on est mince, sinon impossible d’entrer) et enfin, plus de petit déjeuners pour clients occidentaux…
Dommage, le parc est superbe et la piscine très belle…
Un bon point : le personnel est adorable et très serviable.

reviews.title: Étrange Endroit . Tout sauf un 4*
reviews.text:
Un mélange de 1* jusqu’a 4* ! 
Situé face à un centre commercial et au bord de la rivière cet établissement se dit  être un 4* . 
Une réception minuscule  , des couloirs dignes d’une administration des années 70 pour accéder aux restaurants au bord de l’eau . Ces restaurants sont des paillotes un peu boui boui qui servent une nourriture  fade  équivalente à ce qu’ on trouve dans les streets foods mais en mode aseptisé et 4 fois plus Cher .
La piscine fait petite piscine municipale vieillotte sans charme aucun .
Le point fort sont le lit incroyablement confortable et le silence total dans la chambre bien équipée avec balcon . 
La déco et le mobilier sont d’une banalité affligeante . 
Il se dégage une atmosphère bizarre dans cet hôtel qui me semble inclassable. 
À retenir : très bon endroit pour se reposer et dormir parfaitement.
Prix un peu exagéré pour le Vietnam .

reviews.title: Séjour touristique
reviews.text:
Bel hôtel disposant d'une piscine extérieure,, d'une salle de billard et de remise en forme.
Petit bémol,le bar n'est pas approvisionné et le restaurant est fermé. 
Le personnel est accueillant et professionnel.
Les chambres sont spacieuses mais manquent de rangement

reviews.title: charmant,propre,staff au top
reviews.text: Hotel de passage avant de rentrer a saigon,superbe piscine ,staff attentif,joli parc
reviews.positives: la piscine,le jardin ,la proprete des chambres

reviews.title: merveilleux hotel,personnel plus que charmant !
reviews.text: sejour tres agreable,personnel tres attentifs parlant anglais,situation geographique tres bien,calme,piscine superbe

reviews.title: Bel hotel bien placé
reviews.text:
Hoah Binh est un tres bel hotel tres bien placé près du grand centre commercial de la ville.
Le parc est splendide et la piscine très agréable.
Le petit déjeuner est moyen et surtout destiné aux autochtones 
Par contre les chambres sont mal insonorisées et les nombreux cars de touristes locaux qui ne restent qu’une nuit avant de repartir de bonne heure le matin rendent le réveil et le petit déjeuner TRES bruyant.
Dans la salle du petit déjeuner, la propreté est à peine passable et certaines tables sont mal nettoyées ce qui est limite en période de Covid….
Le personnel est très sympa, et particulièrement l'hôtesse d’accueil qui est toujours souriante.

reviews.title: Pour une étape
reviews.text:
Avons passé une nuit avant d'embarquer pour Phu Quoc le lendemain matin.
L'hôtel est situé à moins de 5 minutes en taxi de l'embarcadère, les chambres sont grandes et propres, la piscine agréable pour se détendre après  3h et demi de bus.
La restauration en revanche est une catastrophe. Plusieurs plats de la carte n'étaient pas disponibles et ce que nous avons pu commander était vraiment pitoyable  Fried rice with seafood; un riz tout sec avec juste quelques pauvres minuscules crevettes par-ci par-là). 
L'établissement manque complètement d'âme, la clientèle semblait essentiellement composées de personnes en déplacement professionnel  mais il permet une étape bon marché.

reviews.title: Très  bel hotel
reviews.text: Très bel hotel, personnel charmant, parc et piscine superbe…un seul défaut : pas de petit déjeuner continental…

reviews.title: Hoa  Binh Resort, propre, spacieux et sympa
reviews.text: Séjour court mais très sympa. L'hôtel offre de quoi se divertir et s'occuper si on y reste. Sinon la vieille ville est très agréable, balade au bord des bras de rivières, rues très ombragées par de beaux arbres, très venteux et climat plus frais qu'à Saigon. Nombreux endroits ou prendre un verre de manière agréable.
reviews.positives: Belles prestations pour le prix, bien placé, personnel très agréable et compétent, piscine, salle de sport, billard, salles de karaoke privées, grandes chambres

reviews.title: Un moment calme dans un hôtel tout confort
reviews.text: Un hôtel au calme dans une ville envahie de scooters. Une très agréable piscine avec un jardin, le personnel est attentifs, comme nous partions très tôt pour prendre notre avion ils o t fait ouvrir les cuisines a 30 MM. Plus tôt pour que nous puissions prendre notre petit déjeuner.

reviews.title: Bon rapport Qualité/Prix
reviews.text: Nous apprécions le plus le personnel compétent, agréable et dévoué

reviews.title: Excellentes prestations
reviews.text: Hotel bien situé, chambre très propre, personnel professionnel, petit déjeuner asiatique et un peu continental

reviews.title: Super hôtel
reviews.text:
Hôtel très propre, bien situé dans la ville, personnel très agréable, à la réception, elles sont vraiment très courtoises et serviables! 
Le petit déjeuner Buffet est extraordinaire, merci aux chefs de toujours avoir le sourire tout en nous régalant!
Rien a redire!

reviews.title: excellent accueil et management efficace
reviews.text: Hotel pas trop loin du centre, au calme, un personnel à votre service et un management qui a su trouver une solution à notre pb de transport au beau milieu des fêtes de nouvel an. Un van avec chauffeur mis à notre disposition pendant 4 jours, réservation des billets pour l'île de Phu Quoc, un véhicule qui nous attend sur l'île....

reviews.title: Agréable hôtel
reviews.text:
Très bien situé à quelques pas des restaurants des Coffee et. Nous vous recommandons leVi restaurant qui est excellent 
L hôtel possède une piscine bien agréable et les chambres sont de bonnes qualité 
Petit déjeuner européen un peu Light
Nous recommandons

reviews.title: Sejour 2 nuits
reviews.text: Proprete,  bon accueil. Excellent petit dejeuner inclus. Lit confortable, grand sdb

reviews.title: Idéal pour une halte avant Phu Quoc
reviews.text:
Proche d'un Hyper marché et à 10 mn à pied du bateau rapide pour Phu Quoc. 
Personnel anglophone très souriant et serviable jardin et piscine agréables calme au centre-ville.

reviews.title: Parfait
reviews.text: Grande chambre avec grand salon. Personnel très gentil. Cadre très agréable, jardin avec arbres fruitiers. Très agréable séjour.

reviews.title: perfect
reviews.text:
Charming hotel on the seaside
Room clean and spacious.
Pleasant and helpful staff!

reviews.title: mehr Schein als Sein
reviews.text: WLAN hat beide Tage nicht funktioniert. Englisch von Receptionist sehr basic. Service beim Frühstück war sehr freundlich. Laut bis ca 23 Uhr Karaoke von Gegenüber.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Ok

reviews.title: Große Anlage  für unterschiedliche Veranstaltungen
reviews.text: Das geräumige Zimmer war gut ausgestattet mit großem Flat TV, Minibar, Föhn, Wasserkessel,Balkon, doch leider war die Aussicht direkt auf die Großbaustelle einer neuen Autobrücke bei der Flussmündung. Der Baulärm begann täglich um 5.oo früh. Das Frühstücksbuffet war eher asiatisch geprägt, doch man konnte sich Eier braten lassen.
reviews.positives: großes Zimmer, bequeme breite Betten,viel Ablagemöglichkeiten

reviews.title: Neues, ruhiges Hotel in Rach Gia
reviews.text:
meiner Meinung nach mit Abstand das beste (und auch neueste) Hotel in Rach Gia.
Schöne ruhige Umgebenung (wenn auch etwas außerhalb der Innenstadt) - zur Fähre ist es dennoch nicht so weit.
Nettes Restaurant in schönem Garten direkt am Fluß
reviews.positives: Ruhige Lage, neues Hotel, schöner Blick auf Meer/Fluß

reviews.title: Sehr schönes Resort in guter Lage
reviews.text: Alles super-schönes Resort mit großen Zimmern und einem gepflegten Garten mit Freiluftrestaurant, das Frühstück ebenfalls prima-die Nähe zur Fähre nach Phu Quoc ist gut-ideal für eine Zwischenstation oder auch für länger!

reviews.title: super zum entspannen
reviews.text: Saubete grosse zimmer, gute restaurants, sauberer pool, tolle mitarbeiter

reviews.title: Sehr gutes Hotel
reviews.text: Sehr saubere Zimmer, fantastisches Frühstücksbufett, nettes Hotelpersonal, gutes Englisch. Gym-Raum lieblos, von den 2 Bars war nichts zu sehen. Dennoch haben wir 2 schöne Tage verbracht.

reviews.title: Gutes Hotel für eine Nacht!
reviews.text: Wir haben nur eine Nacht hier übernachtet. Die Lage ist gut, doch die Zimmer sind einfach. Wir hatten Probleme mit der Klimaanlage, doch es wurde direkt reagiert und wir sind am Abend nochmal umgezogen. Das Frühstück war sehr lecker und ausreichend. Nur den Kaffee könnte man nicht trinken. Der Pool wirkt sehr lieblos und es fehlen Sonnenschirme.

reviews.title: Sauberes Hotel mit sehr netten Angestellten
reviews.text: Wir haben auf unserer Reise Richtung Phu Quoc eine Nacht in dem Hoa Binh Rach Gia Resort übernachtet. Es ist sehr sauber, alle waren sehr nett und auch ein leckeres Frühstück gab es hier. Bis zum Hafen zählt man Ca. 250.000 Dong und es dauert in etwa 15-20 Minuten. Sehr zu empfehlen!

reviews.title: tolles hotel zum entspannen
reviews.text: Eine tolle Erholungsoase um zwei, drei tage frische energie für die weiterreise zu sammeln. Frühstück wechselt täglich. Das hotel ist blitzblank sauber und die mitarbeiter sind freundlich und hilfsbereit. Die paar dong was es hier mehr kostet sind es wert. Jederzeit gerne wieder.

reviews.title: Luxushotel zum guten Preis-Leistungsverhältnis
reviews.positives: Sehr großes Zimmer und Badezimmer, sehr schön angelegte Gartenanlage

reviews.title: Preis Leistung gut
reviews.text: Gutes Hotel mit einem super Frühstück und sehr hilfreichem Hotelpersonal, dass bei der Planung von Touren sehr behilflich ist. Die Planung wurde komplett übernommen.

reviews.title: Nessuno parla inglese
reviews.text: Purtroppo in un 4 stelle non si puo non avere qualcuno che parla inglese al desk! PER QUESTO MOTIVO NON mi hanno inviato un taxi alla staxione..per es..poi quando ero li,per fortuna hanno telefonato ad un tipoche parla inglese e sono riuscita a spiegare di cosa avevo bisogno,e ha soddosfatto egregiamante,le mie richieste. Ma comunque sia la sera che la mattina al desk nessuno parlava inglese!!!assolutamente inconcepibile

reviews.title: disponibilità
reviews.text:
nonostante non parlino bene l'inglese la loro gentilezza è evidente fon da subito ,situato in una zona trafficata ma come d' altronde lo è questa citta' ma al suo interno è molto confortevole camera pulita
e spaziosa!

reviews.title: Vreselijk
reviews.text:
Zeer slecht restaurant
Vuil en vies
Geen airco op de kamers 
Veel lawaai

reviews.title: Groot hotel op een goede plaats. Prima service van het personeel.
reviews.text: De gym was matig. De loopband deed het niet.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: The hotel is in a non touristic city. We feld to be the only one in the city and the hotel. Nice pool. The breakfast was very rich but not our taste at all (vegetarian dishes are  hard to find, also outside the hotel).

reviews.title: Heerlijk hotel
reviews.text:
Fantastisch goed hotel met uitgebreid ontbijt inbegrepen. 
Faciliteiten zijn uitstekend, prijs/kwaliteit krijgt van mij een 10. 
Hotel ligt vlakbij een drukke straat, maar je hoort er bijna niets van. Als 60-jarige is mijn gehoor verre van scherp,  ik hoor wel iets van het verkeer, maar ben echt positief verrast hoe goed dit hotel is geïsoleerd.

reviews.title: Grote kamer
reviews.text:
Ruime kamer met comfortabele bedden.
Tijdens ons verblijf viel de airco uit en kregen we zonder probleem een nieuwe kamer.
Receptie boekte onze tickets naar Phu Quoc.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Erg goed

reviews.title: luxe stadshotel
reviews.text: We hebben genoten van een heerlijk verblijf in dit luxe hotel met een heerlijk zwembad. Het personeel was uitermate vriendelijk en behulpzaam. Het centrum is lopend gemakkelijk te bereiken.
reviews.positives: hotel ligt in een tuin, heeft een heerlijk zwembad, en uitermate behulpzame medewerkers

reviews.title: Old hotel
reviews.text: Not good smell in room due to old hotel.

reviews.title: 快適
reviews.text:
リバービューがおすすめ。
空港まで20分ほどの位置。

reviews.title: 海近くのホテル
reviews.text:
ビジネスでよく利用するホテル。
価格とのバランスが良いホテル。

reviews.title: 快適ホテル
reviews.text: 滞在時は寝るだけだったのでよくわからないが、部屋は清潔で泊まった部屋は広く、インターネットの繋がりも良い。ただ、朝食が外庭のレストランにて1品か2品しか頼めないのでその点が残念。
reviews.positives: インターネットの回線が良い

reviews.title: 立地、サービス、部屋が価格相応
reviews.text:
リバービューがおすすめ。
空港まで20分ほどの位置。

reviews.title: ホテルの位置が確認できる地図が欲しかった。貰った地図ではフロントも確認できなかった。
reviews.positives: 清潔感、agodaで予約したままの部屋、小さいながらもプールがある。

reviews.title: ラックギアで一番のホテル
reviews.text: ラックギアのホテルの中で一番いいのではないでしょうか。他に泊まってみたいホテルがあるので暫定1位というところでしょうか。とにかく敷地が広く緑地帯の中にホテルがあるので、雰囲気もよくどこから写真を撮っても絵になる。小さめだがプールもあるし朝食は外の庭でいただきます。環境の良く静かなので街の喧騒を忘れる。それでいて安かった。
reviews.positives: 庭が広い・海が近い・周囲が静か

reviews.title: I would stay here again!
reviews.text:
Friendly staff, clean room and good breakfast with plenty of Vietnamese food.
Hotel location is good too.
The shopping mall, many coffee shops, Rach Gia bay are a short distance from this hotel.
Around this area, English speaker is limited.

reviews.title: Rach Giaで最高のホテル
reviews.positives: ガーデンでの食事は本当に美味しい。

reviews.title: ラックザー中心部で利便性も良く、設備も清潔
reviews.text:
まず立地場所が良い
水回りも日本人にも快適

reviews.title: 太遠了
reviews.text: 地理位子太遠了，附近也沒有吃的東西或便利商店，位子不佳，其他都算還可以
